title: Mid-Level SEO Specialist at Dishis Designer Jewellery

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level SEO Specialist at Dishis Designer Jewellery
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate SEO Specialist with drive and ambition, Dishis Designer Jewellery in Delhi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Dishis Designer Jewellery:
Dishis Designer Jewellery is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dishis Designer Jewellery!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
